subject: prelude
body:
Emmy,   j.s. bach allegedly told his students , playing the piano was really  easy, " just play the right note at the right time"..  WIth that in mind, how does 3 0clock sound , for an early tea,, . I will be glad to have my driver collect you..  I can modify both the "pitch " and the timing if more convenient. , however I leave this evening.    jeffrey
